_comment: Glossary terms -> short definitions. The FIRST occurrence of each term on a page gets a hover tooltip (native <abbr title>). Keep definitions short and plain. Designers: add game-specific / locked terms here, grounded in the design plan - the mechanism picks them up automatically, no code change. Keys starting with _ are ignored.
auto-combat: Combat your character resolves automatically - you shape the build and the plan rather than controlling each action.
idle game: A game designed to keep progressing while you are away, rewarding smart setup over constant input.
build: The combination of class, skills, items, and choices that defines how your character fights.
DPS: Damage per second - a rough measure of sustained offensive output.
